title: PolyAPI Server Function
description: A server function is a Knative serverless function that runs in the PolyAPI cloud infrastructure, supporting TypeScript, Python, Java, and C# languages.

id.description: The unique identifier of the server function.

name.description: The name of the server function.

description.description: A description of what the server function does.

context.description: The context path for organizing the function in the catalog.

language.description: The programming language of the function.

deploymentId.description: The deployment identifier for the function.

state.description: The lifecycle state of the function.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the function was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the function was last updated.
